body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.66-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/folder/13176910/test-cases/86864930 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** - **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** MacBook Air 15.7.4 Chrome, iPhone 15 iOS 26.3.1 **App Component:** Search ## Action Performed: 1. Sign in to ND 2. Navigate to the Workspace chat 3. Create an empty report 4. Right click on the report and click "Reply in thread" 5. Verify the message preview for the report in LHN displays "No activity yet" 6. Click on the Search icon 7. Verify the message preview in search router displays "No activity yet" 8. Create a Scan Expense inside this empty report by uploading a receipt 9. Immediately observe the message preview in the LHN and Search Router while the receipt is Scanning 10. Verify during Receipt Scanning both LHN and Search router show "Receipt scanning..." 11. Wait for the scanning to complete 12. Verify both LHN and Search show the exact same message ## Expected Result: Report preview message in Search matches the message in LHN ## Actual Result: Report preview message is not shown in Search when click "Reply in thread", while scanning a receipt, or for the scanned expense ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3cd7c24-ff4c-4f68-bfd2-f8dc6236a347 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

title: [$250] Prevent AppReview modal from showing when another modal is already visible

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
When the AppReview modal appears while another modal is already present, it causes layout issues. We need to add a check so that the AppReview modal is suppressed whenever any other modal is currently visible. **Current behavior:** AppReview modal can appear on top of or alongside other modals, resulting in broken/wrong layout. **Expected behavior:** If any other modal is already being displayed, the AppReview modal should not be shown. **Slack thread:** https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07HPDRELLD/p1777899221743389
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @shubham1206agra
